notes: Section 1251, , , related to examination for Federal recognition upon unit vacancy promotion. See , National Guard.act Sept. 3, 1954, ch. 1257, title III, § 31968 Stat. 1160section 309 of Title 32
Section 1252, , , related to extension of automatic Federal recognition to higher grade. See .act Sept. 3, 1954, ch. 1257, title III, § 32068 Stat. 1160section 310 of Title 32
